title: astragalus garbancillo
intro: Astragalus garbancillo, also known as Goat's Beard or Spanish Goat's Beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of infections, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, particularly in elderly individuals. Astragalus garbancillo is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
